methods.method_name: Peak Number and Standard Deviation Measurement
methods.description: This method quantifies changes in Ca2+ sensor fluorescence signals during pollen tube growth by measuring the number of peaks and the standard deviation of fluorescence signals. It helps in understanding the dynamics of cytoplasmic and nuclear Ca2+ fluctuations.

steps.description: Cytoplasmic peaks were determined based on an RFP fluorescence intensity increase of 150 A.U. or higher from the baseline.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify cytoplasmic peaks with RFP intensity increase of 150 A.U. or more

steps.description: Nuclear Ca2+ peaks were determined based on a YFP/CFP ratio increase of 0.25 A.U. or higher.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify nuclear Ca2+ peaks with YFP/CFP ratio increase of 0.25 A.U. or more

steps.description: The average fluorescence intensity or YFP/CFP ratio and the standard deviation for each 200-frame time-lapse movie was calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate average fluorescence intensity and standard deviation for time-lapse movies

steps.description: All 20 standard deviations were then averaged to determine the mean standard deviation for R-GECO1 in WT, R-GECO1 in wit12, NLS-YC3.6 in WT, and NLS-YC3.6 in wit12.
steps.searchable_summary: Compute mean standard deviation across 20 samples for different conditions

steps.description: Nuclear Ca2+ fluctuations after addition of H2O2 were analyzed.
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze nuclear Ca2+ fluctuations post H2O2 addition

steps.description: Student's t-test was used to determine significance with * P ≤ 0.05; **P ≤ 0.01; *** P ≤ 0.001.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform Student's t-test for statistical significance

steps.description: The localization of the VN (orange) and SCs (green) was examined in elongating pollen tubes at 5 and 7 hpp.
steps.searchable_summary: Visualize VN and SCs localization in pollen tubes

steps.description: The position of the SCs and VN relative to the tip and distance between the SCs and VN was quantified for WT and wit12 pollen tubes at both time points.
steps.searchable_summary: Quantify SCs and VN positions relative to pollen tube tip
inputs: Position data of SCs and VN
